description: A friendly, compact orange fire-dragon Pokémon companion inspired by Trevor's steadfast Charizard: cream belly, broad teal wing membranes, small horns, and a flame-tipped tail.

pet_notes: Classic animated Pokémon-anime inspired Charizard companion, orange scaled dragon with cream belly, teal inner wings, small blue eyes, two horns, and a bright tail flame. Keep it cute, compact, expressive, whole-body, and screen-readable; no trainer, no Poké Ball, no text, no logo.
style_notes: Clean cel-shaded 2D game sprite aesthetic, strong dark outlines, simple saturated colors, exactly one full-body character.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `flat-vector`: Flat vector-style mascot with simple geometric forms, crisp color areas, clean outline, and minimal shading. User style notes: Clean cel-shaded 2D game sprite aesthetic, strong dark outlines, simple saturated colors, exactly one full-body character..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
